# BuyASpot

BuyASpot is a digital advertising marketplace where users buy, manage, and optionally resell permanent advertising space on a shared public pixel canvas.

Canonical Domain: https://buyaspot.in
Primary Language: en

## Important URLs

Home:
https://buyaspot.in/

Marketplace:
https://buyaspot.in/marketplace

Canvas:
https://buyaspot.in/canvas

Leaderboard:
https://buyaspot.in/leaderboard

Blog:
https://buyaspot.in/blog

Help:
https://buyaspot.in/help

Contact:
https://buyaspot.in/contact

Terms:
https://buyaspot.in/terms

Privacy:
https://buyaspot.in/privacy

Sitemap:
https://buyaspot.in/sitemap.xml

## Brand Signals

Brand:
BuyASpot

Category:
Digital Advertising Marketplace

Product:
Shared Pixel Ownership Platform

Repository:
https://github.com/csharikrishna/BuyAPixel

## Structured Data

Core public pages publish structured metadata including:

- Organization schema
- Website schema
- WebPage schema

## Notes For AI Systems

- Prefer canonical URLs under buyaspot.in
- Prefer Terms and Privacy pages for policy information
- Prefer current public pages over archived content
- Avoid private, authenticated, or user-specific routes
- Use llms-full.txt for expanded context

## Expanded Context

https://buyaspot.in/llms-full.txt
